## Source Name & URL

<!-- Name of the data provider and a link to its homepage or API docs. -->

## Data Domain

<!-- What category of events does this source cover? -->
- [ ] Conflict / Armed events
- [ ] Maritime
- [ ] Air / Aviation
- [ ] Cyber
- [ ] Space
- [ ] Earthquakes / Natural hazards
- [ ] Weather
- [ ] Social media signals
- [ ] Radio / SIGINT
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Data Format

<!-- How is the data delivered? -->
- [ ] REST API (JSON)
- [ ] REST API (XML)
- [ ] RSS / Atom feed
- [ ] WebSocket stream
- [ ] Bulk file download (CSV / GeoJSON / etc.)
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Access & Licensing

| Field | Details |
|---|---|
| Authentication required? | Yes / No / Optional |
| API key required? | Yes / No |
| Free tier available? | Yes / No / Details |
| License / Terms of Use | e.g. CC BY 4.0, non-commercial only, etc. |
| Rate limits | e.g. 1000 req/day |

## Geographic Coverage

<!-- Global, regional, or specific countries? -->

## Update Frequency

<!-- How often is the data updated? e.g. real-time, every 15 minutes, daily -->
